evidence.redaction_summary: Fresh-install screenshots, UI tree, and logs contain no private account, key, provider token, feed, transcript, or audio material.

attempts.notes: Initial build failed because Derived/Sources/TuistAssets+Podcastr.swift and TuistBundle+Podcastr.swift were missing in the fresh worktree.

The second build/run hit the MCP 300s timeout, but the app installed and launched. Screenshot showed onboarding; UI tree exposed hidden main-shell controls behind onboarding. Hidden Settings tap probe returned SUCCEEDED but did not navigate.

Focused post-fix revalidation passed locally: onboarding is visible and known hidden main-shell controls are absent from the XCTest accessibility automation tree. All required GitHub checks later passed and PR #745 merged.

template_impact: iOS Liquid Glass grounding drives restrained material judgment: glass belongs on navigation/control chrome, not dense content, with accessibility fallbacks.
Apple HIG grounding drives factual checks for safe areas, system typography, Dynamic Type, semantic color, 44 pt touch targets, navigation conventions, and accessibility.
Mobile app interface grounding drives user-goal framing, thumb reach, native navigation, purposeful haptics, list performance, material fallback checks, and performance-as-UX budgets.
The generated page front-loads launch readiness, risk class, evidence quality, accessibility status, regression coverage, and dependency posture before detailed scores.
The report separates individual dimensions from whole-product cluster judgment so an isolated pass cannot hide a weak or inconsistent product flow.

scenario.title: Onboarding page 1 appears and no main-tab state is reachable behind it

accessibility_dynamic_type.summary: Focused XCTest proves the known hidden main-shell controls are absent after the fix. Dynamic Type, VoiceOver traversal, contrast, Reduce Motion, and Reduce Transparency still require a full audit.

actual_result.summary: Post-fix focused revalidation shows the visible first onboarding page and no known main-shell controls exposed behind it in XCTest accessibility automation.

analytics_privacy_boundaries.summary: Not assessed. Confirm useful event boundaries without PII, private keys, raw transcripts/audio, or provider secrets.

artifacts.summary: Attached a current screenshot, semantic UI-tree excerpt, build/run log tail, launch console log, and runtime OSLog.

attempted_test.summary: Executed FND-001 on an erased dedicated iPhone 17 simulator with no --UITestSeed argument. Captured first page screenshot, UI tree, build log, launch log, and OSLog.

before_after_deltas.summary: Current evidence must be read as before/action/after deltas across the flow steps; any missing pair remains listed in instrumentation gaps.

content_hierarchy.summary: Not assessed. Verify podcast/show/episode/transcript/agent content outranks chrome and does not truncate critical meaning.

controls_gestures_audio.summary: Not assessed. Review must check buttons, menus, sheets, gestures, audio route controls, haptics, keyboard alternatives, and one-handed reach.

cross_screen_continuity.summary: Not assessed. Capture before/after navigation state for adjacent surfaces and ensure mini-player, queue, transcript, agent, and settings remain coherent.

data_integrity_state_sync.summary: Not assessed. Verify persisted state, Rust projections, Swift render state, queue/download/transcript/index data, and exported/imported records agree before and after the user-visible action.

defects_issues_filed.summary: Filed #743 for the hidden main-shell semantic exposure behind onboarding; PR #745 fixed it and closed the issue after required GitHub checks passed.

device_os_matrix.summary: No device/OS matrix has run. The first validation should record simulator/device, OS, locale, appearance, Dynamic Type, and network state.

device_viewport_coverage.summary: Not assessed. Record iPhone size class, Dynamic Type, orientation when relevant, and generated GitHub Pages desktop/mobile viewport checks for the published report page.

error_recovery_behavior.summary: Not assessed. Error, offline, retry, cancellation, and recovery paths must be captured where the scenario can fail.

evidence_confidence.summary: Evidence confidence is zero until a current build, device/OS, rerun count, freshness, and flake notes are attached.

evidence_provenance.summary: 6 non-catalog artifact(s) are attached with their published IDs, paths, redaction metadata, and run context.

execution_attempts.summary: Three attempts are recorded: the initial build-shape failure, the original FND-001 semantic failure, and the post-fix focused revalidation that passed before PR #745 merged.

expected_behavior.summary: Expected behavior from BDD: onboarding page 1 appears and no main-tab state is reachable behind it. NMP/RMP boundary declared by the catalog: D1,D5.

flow.summary: Catalog flow for Foundation And First Run: Given a fresh install with no app group data, when Pod0 launches, then onboarding page 1 appears and no main-tab state is reachable behind it.

information_architecture.summary: Not assessed. Confirm the user knows location, current mode, and next action from titles, tabs, bars, breadcrumbs, and hierarchy.

instrumentation_gaps.summary: Screenshots, UI trees, logs, metrics, cassettes, and accessibility audits are listed as explicit missing evidence so gaps cannot be hidden in prose.

liquid_glass_ios_primitives.summary: Visible glass-like treatment is restrained to the app icon/feature chips/CTA chrome and preserves contrast in light mode. Post-fix proof shows no main-shell chrome exposed behind onboarding; Reduce Transparency and dark mode still need audit coverage.

localization_content_quality.summary: Not assessed. Review must check locale-sensitive strings, podcast metadata, transcript/agent content, truncation, empty/error copy, and translation safety.

media_session_background_continuity.summary: Not assessed. For podcast-facing flows, verify audio session route, mini-player/full-player continuity, queue state, lock-screen/background behavior, interruptions, and remote commands or mark them N/A with rationale.

motion_haptics.summary: Not assessed. Record transition, haptic, and Reduce Motion behavior when motion is part of the flow.

navigation_state_restoration.summary: Not assessed. Capture tab, sheet, detail path, back stack, deep-link, and relaunch restoration state so navigation success cannot hide stale or contradictory product state.

next_actions.summary: Run the scenario, attach evidence, score every dimension, file defects, and republish this page from validated JSON.

nmp_architecture_cohesiveness.summary: Not assessed. Declared NMP/RMP boundary: D1,D5. Review must check Rust-owned state/policy, thin native renderers, bounded FFI, replay clocks, and privacy fail-closed behavior.

observability.summary: Not assessed. Attach structured logs, metric IDs, provider/request IDs, relay IDs, and redacted traces needed to diagnose failures.

offline_resume_behavior.summary: Not assessed. Offline, interruption, relaunch, background playback, cancellation, retry, and resume behavior must be captured where applicable.

notes: Issue #743 is fixed and revalidated by focused screenshot/XCTest evidence, but the full scenario rerun is not complete.
Related scenario cluster coherence remains incomplete until adjacent pages are reviewed together.
owner_status.summary: Readiness gates, instrumentation gaps, risks, issues, and next actions carry owner/status fields for follow-through.

performance_metrics.summary: Cold launch to first onboarding frame was not measured. The MCP build/run retry timed out at 300s even though the app later launched, so no defensible launch-to-first-frame metric is attached.

persona_job_acceptance.summary: Persona: A new or returning podcast listener completing a core Pod0 job on iPhone. Acceptance criteria are the scenario Given/When/Then plus the declared architecture boundary D1,D5.

privacy_security.summary: Not assessed. Validation must scan screenshots, logs, cassettes, relays, and exports for leaked keys, tokens, private audio, or private Nostr material.

notes: Review adjacent scenario pages as a cluster before promoting group coherence.
product_cluster_coherence.summary: Foundation And First Run cluster coherence remains incomplete until adjacent scenarios are judged together; FND-001 now contributes closed-defect evidence and remaining evidence gaps to that group view.

product_coherence_in_context.summary: FND-001 has post-fix proof that onboarding no longer exposes the known main-shell controls behind first-run setup. Launch readiness remains blocked until the cold-launch metric, accessibility-settings audit, and adjacent Foundation flow checks are complete.

notes: Issue #743 is fixed and revalidated by focused screenshot/XCTest evidence, but the full scenario rerun is not complete.
Related scenario cluster coherence remains incomplete until adjacent pages are reviewed together.
readiness_gates.summary: Ship gate remains blocked by missing metric/accessibility evidence and cluster follow-up, not by the closed #743 semantic gate defect.

regression_risk.summary: Not assessed. Validation must list adjacent scenarios and modules to rerun after any fix.

reliability_flakiness.summary: Not assessed. Validation must record rerun count, retry causes, flake history, stale-build risk, timeout behavior, and deterministic replay coverage.

replayability_cassette_provenance.summary: Not assessed. Declared dependencies: erased sim. Provider, relay, STT, TTS, LLM, and network behavior must use replay cassettes or explain live-only evidence.

revalidation_status.summary: 1 fixed issue and 0 open scenario defects are linked. Focused screenshot and XCTest proof show the known hidden main-shell controls are absent after the structural onboarding gate fix.

notes: npx skills search "iOS mobile UI UX liquid glass native polish validation" returned ios-liquid-glass and mobile-app-interface among the selected results.
Applied Liquid Glass guidance: glass belongs on controls/chrome, not dense hidden content; accessibility settings must remain legible.
Applied HIG/mobile guidance: safe areas, Dynamic Type, 44x44 pt controls, semantic labels, and onboarding should be brief and not expose contradictory app state.
review_skill_grounding.summary: This review used the requested skills search and grounded critique in vabole/apple-skills@ios-liquid-glass, vabole/apple-skills@hig, and qodex-ai/ai-agent-skills@mobile-app-interface.

risks_follow_up.summary: Current risks are scaffolded from missing evidence and cluster regression exposure. Actionable defects must gain issue/PR links and revalidation run IDs.

scenario_setup.summary: Declared setup dependencies: erased sim. Provider mode is none until validation attaches fixtures or cassettes.

sister_app_nmp_chirp_comparison.summary: Not assessed. Review must compare applicable NMP doctrine and known Chirp/sister-app fixes before marking this flow cohesive.

states_resilience.summary: Not assessed. Capture empty, loading, denied, unavailable, offline, retry, and recovery states reached by this scenario.

touch_ergonomics.summary: Not assessed. Audit primary controls for reachability, 44x44 pt targets, spacing, and gesture alternatives.

ui_polish_report.summary: The visible first page is well composed in light mode: centered icon, clear headline, readable copy, restrained feature chips, progress dots, and a bottom Get Started control above the home indicator.

ux_polish_report.summary: The first-run gate now behaves coherently for the known failure: onboarding is the only exposed app surface until setup is complete. Full accessibility settings and adjacent-flow coverage remain open.

verdict.summary: The #743 semantic gate defect is fixed and revalidated. FND-001 remains blocked for launch readiness until metric_trace, accessibility_audit, and adjacent Foundation flow coverage are complete.

verdict.score_gate_explanation: The #743 semantic gate defect is fixed and revalidated by focused XCTest/screenshot evidence; launch readiness remains blocked by missing metric_trace, accessibility_audit, and cluster revalidation evidence.
verdict.summary: FND-001 is post-fix blocked, not defect-failed: the known hidden main-shell controls are absent after PR #745, but required launch/accessibility evidence is still missing.
